title: Lokalisierte RepoBrief-Bundles sicher aufräumen
goal: Define and implement evidence-bound retention and garbage collection for immutable consumer-local RepoBrief bundles without deleting any generation that is referenced, leased, under publication, required for rollback or not yet proven unreachable.

acceptance.assertion: Reachability roots, rollback windows, leases, in-progress publication markers and minimum retention are explicit and versioned.
The collector defaults to a deterministic dry run that reports candidates, reasons, byte totals and proof inputs before any deletion.
Deletion requires a fresh reachability recheck and refuses referenced, leased, recent, malformed, unexpected or concurrently changing trees.
Interrupted collection is idempotent, auditable and cannot remove the currently authoritative or rollback-required generation.
Property-style reachability tests, race tests, dry-run dogfood, the complete Lenskit suite and GitHub CI pass on the exact implementation head.
The result does not claim optimal storage use, deletion on untrusted network filesystems, recovery without retained generations or automatic policy choice.
